name: historical_row_count
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM axon_table

name: historical_total_value
sql: SELECT SUM(value) AS total_value FROM axon_table

name: historical_group_by_category
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM axon_table GROUP BY category ORDER BY category

name: historical_cte_count
sql: WITH filtered AS (SELECT id FROM axon_table WHERE category = 'A') SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM filtered
